name: Keen Vision Acquisition Corp.
business: Keen Vision Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It raised proceeds from its IPO and private placement, held in trust, to finance an initial business combination.

exposures.sentence: Our efforts to identify a prospective target business is not limited to a particular industry or geographic region, although we intend to capitalize on the management team's global network and focus our search of target businesses on the following areas: Biotechnology.

Our efforts to identify a prospective target business is not limited to a particular industry or geographic region, although we intend to capitalize on the management team's global network and focus our search of target businesses on the following areas: Consumer goods.

Our efforts to identify a prospective target business is not limited to a particular industry or geographic region, although we intend to capitalize on the management team's global network and focus our search of target businesses on the following areas: Agriculture.

catalysts.event: Deadline to execute Replacement Merger Agreement with Novoheart Group Limited
catalysts.sentence: The LOI will terminate and be of no further force or effect upon the earliest of (a) execution of the Replacement Merger Agreement, (b) mutual written agreement of the parties, or (c) if the Replacement Merger Agreement is not executed by us and NVH on or before April 10, 2026.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: As of the date of this annual report, we further extended the time to consummate our initial business combination to April 27, 2026.
